## Highlights

- **D26 — D22 scope extension.** The doc-authoring protocol now governs **ginee-authored GitHub issue bodies + framework-authored comments**, not just adopter docs. Same 5 mandatory checks; same default-shape map (inventories → tables · steps → numbered lists · multi-rule → parent + sub-bullets).
- **Lint covers every section, including Summary** — no exemption for length. A one-sentence Summary still trips the checks if it packs a comma-separated inventory into a parenthetical.
- **Enforcement is LLM self-review** embedded in the 4 `ginee-file-*` skills + comment-cadence procedures. No external linter; no runtime dependencies. Violations surface as restructure suggestions in the user-approval prompt before publishing.
- **Reporter-authored content unchanged.** D14 forbidden upheld (*"Never edit an issue body authored by another reporter"*). `ginee-pick-up` MAY surface a polite restructure advisory at pickup time but never auto-edits.
- **4 issue templates** gain a D26 shape-rule banner. **3 new bad/good example pairs** in `core/doc-authoring-examples.md` — Issue Summary · Issue body section · Phase-transition comment.

## Adopter migration

**None required.** Purely additive. No `local/*` schema change. The next time you invoke a `ginee-file-*` skill OR receive a framework-authored comment, the self-lint runs automatically; you'll see any restructure suggestions in the approval prompt.

Reporter-authored content (your own issue bodies, your own comments) is unchanged.

Full spec: [`core/MIGRATIONS/D26-doc-protocol-scope-extension.md`](https://github.com/kostiantyn-matsebora/ginee/blob/main/core/MIGRATIONS/D26-doc-protocol-scope-extension.md).

**Full Changelog:** https://github.com/kostiantyn-matsebora/ginee/compare/v0.10.0...v0.11.0
